task_completion.description: The agent opened AstroImageJ and loaded the eagle_ha_656nmos.fits image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ interface is visible with an image window displaying 'eagle_ha_656nmos.fits'.

task_completion.description: The agent measured the maximum pixel intensity of the original image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ 'Results' window, histogram, or status bar showing the 'Max' value for the original image.

task_completion.description: The agent applied a spatial Median filter to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Median' filter dialog box is open, or the image window shows a visibly smoothed version of the nebula with stars erased/blurred.

task_completion.description: The agent measured the maximum pixel intensity of the filtered image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ 'Results' window, histogram, or status bar showing the 'Max' value for the newly filtered image.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the filtered image as starless_ha.fits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the filename 'starless_ha.fits' or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in the nebula_analysis directory.

task_completion.description: The agent created suppression_stats.txt with the three required lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the creation of 'suppression_stats.txt' containing exactly 'Original_Max:', 'Filtered_Max:', and 'Median_Radius_Used:' with their corresponding values.

integrity.description: The agent used the AstroImageJ GUI for all processing as requested, rather than external scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with AstroImageJ menus, dialogs, and windows. There should be no evidence of Python scripts, ImageMagick, or other CLI image processing tools being executed in a terminal.

integrity.description: The values recorded in the text file match the actual measurements obtained in AstroImageJ.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical values for Original_Max and Filtered_Max in the text file visually match the numbers displayed in the AstroImageJ Results or Histogram windows in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The median radius recorded in the text file matches the radius used in the AstroImageJ Median filter dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value for 'Median_Radius_Used' in the text file matches the radius value entered in the AstroImageJ Median filter configuration dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output FITS file must be saved at /home/ga/AstroImages/nebula_analysis/starless_ha.fits. The expected text file must be saved at /home/ga/AstroImages/nebula_analysis/suppression_stats.txt. The original image is of the Eagle Nebula (M16) in H-alpha from the Hubble Space Telescope.
